notifications.description: Review operational events generated by campaigns, replays, and scheduled executions.
notifications.emptyDescription: Important platform events will appear here when campaigns, replays, or schedules finish.
password.invalid: Password does not meet the platform requirements.

header.default.title: Career Scout
header.default.subtitle: AI Agent Control Center
login.heroTitle: Enter the agent's official recommendation dashboard.
login.heroDescription: Access your Inbox, Repository, campaign history, and audits using the platform's secure session.
login.title: Login
login.description: Use your platform credentials to continue.
account.firstAccessHeroDescription: Use the activation token created by the administrator and define your first password.
account.forgotPasswordHeroDescription: Request a reset token and use it to define a new password securely.
account.resetPasswordHeroDescription: Use your reset token to restore access and return to the login screen.
account.firstAccessDescription: Paste your activation token and create your password to activate the account.
account.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your account e-mail to request a reset token.
account.resetPasswordDescription: Paste your reset token and define a new password.
account.changePasswordDescription: Confirm your current password and define a new secure password.
account.changePasswordHelp: Use a password that satisfies every requirement. The dashboard checks the same rules enforced by the backend before sending the request.
account.forgotPasswordError: Unable to request the reset token.
account.resetTokenGenerated: Reset token generated. Use it on the reset password page.

header.adminUsers.subtitle: Manage Career Scout Platform users

header.platformHealth.title: Platform Health

header.administrationCenter.title: Administration Center
header.administrationCenter.subtitle: Centralized platform administration and activity
header.notifications.title: Notifications
header.notifications.subtitle: Operational notifications and execution events
header.candidateProfile.title: Candidate Profile
header.candidateProfile.subtitle: Manage the authenticated user's career profile
header.resumes.title: Resumes

admin.accessDeniedDescription: Only ADMIN users can access this area.
admin.usersDescription: Create, activate, block, and reset platform users without SQL or external tools.
agentSettings.title: Agent Settings
agentSettings.description: Administrative registry for future agent configuration. Phase 1 is observational only and does not change runtime behavior.
agentSettings.search: Search by key, source, or description
agentSettings.selectSetting: Select a setting to view details.
candidateProfile.title: Candidate Profile
candidateProfile.description: This career profile belongs to the authenticated user and remains separate from the IAM user profile.
candidateProfile.foundation: Foundation only · not consumed by the agent yet
resumes.title: Resumes
resumes.description: Manage the authenticated user's resume library. Phase 1 does not feed these files into the agent yet.
resumes.libraryDescription: Official platform resume repository owned by the authenticated user.
resumes.selectFileRequired: Select a PDF or DOCX file before uploading.
linkedinAccounts.title: LinkedIn Accounts
linkedinAccounts.description: Manage the authenticated user's LinkedIn accounts. Phase 1 does not feed these sessions into Discovery yet.
linkedinAccounts.storageStateHelp: Paste the storage_state JSON. The API stores it through the encryption boundary and never returns it.
linkedinAccounts.libraryDescription: Official platform account repository owned by the authenticated user.
linkedinAccounts.storageStateProtected: Storage state is protected and hidden after save.
linkedinAccounts.defaultFailed: Unable to update default LinkedIn account.
campaignProfiles.title: Campaign Profiles
campaignProfiles.description: Create user-owned campaign configuration profiles that connect a Candidate Profile, Resume, LinkedIn Account, and search preferences. Phase 1 does not feed these profiles into the agent yet.
campaignProfiles.name: Profile name
campaignProfiles.missingReferences: Create a Candidate Profile, active Resume, and active LinkedIn Account before creating a Campaign Profile.
campaignProfiles.libraryDescription: Official platform campaign configuration repository owned by the authenticated user.
campaignProfiles.candidateProfileRequire: Save a Candidate Profile before creating a Campaign Profile.
campaignProfiles.referencesRequired: Select an active Resume and LinkedIn Account.
campaignProfiles.defaultFailed: Unable to update default Campaign Profile.
campaignRun.confirmDescription: Start a new agent execution using this Campaign Profile.
header.agentExecutions.title: Agent Executions
header.agentExecutions.subtitle: Operational view of Career Scout campaign executions
header.runCampaignWizard.title: Run Campaign Wizard
header.runCampaignWizard.subtitle: Guided setup validation before starting a campaign
header.campaignInspector.title: Campaign Inspector
header.campaignInspector.subtitle: Inspect CampaignContext validation and Planner Shadow data
header.campaignComparison.title: Campaign Comparison
header.campaignComparison.subtitle: Compare campaign executions and opportunity evolution
header.agentExecutionDetails.title: Execution Details
header.agentExecutionDetails.subtitle: Persisted agent execution report and operational evidence
campaignInspector.title: Campaign Inspector
campaignInspector.description: Inspect the CampaignContext prepared from a Campaign Profile without running the agent or changing operational behavior.
campaignInspector.loadingDescription: Loading Campaign Profiles and platform context.
campaignInspector.emptyDescription: Create a Campaign Profile before inspecting CampaignContext readiness.
campaignInspector.validatingDescription: Fetching validation, readiness, and shadow analysis from the API.
agentExecutions.title: Executions
agentExecutions.description: Inspect campaigns already executed by Career Scout without recalculating any decision.
agentExecutions.loadingDescription: Fetching persisted executions from the Career Scout API.
agentExecutions.emptyDescription: No persisted executions match the selected filters.
agentExecutions.notFoundDescription: The requested execution could not be found.
agentExecutions.reportPendingDescription: The campaign has started. The persisted execution report will appear when the backend publishes it.
header.workspace.title: Workspace
header.workspace.subtitle: Account readiness, quick actions, and personal insights
header.home.title: Home
header.home.subtitle: Platform overview and operational status
home.errorDescription: Unable to load the platform overview.
home.welcomeDescription: Your operating dashboard for recommendations, executions, profile readiness, and agent health.
